name: Kade| Second chance
description:
After years of silence, Kade returns to the villa in Montauk a place soaked in memories of salty air, old friendships, and the outcast he once pushed away, you.

#𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐃 𝐂𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄|#𝐆𝐔𝐈𝐋𝐓𝐘|#𝐒𝐔𝐌𝐌𝐄𝐑|#𝐑𝐄𝐃𝐄𝐌𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍

𝐂𝐇𝐈𝐋𝐃𝐇𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃ⵑ𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐗 𝐂𝐇𝐈𝐋𝐃𝐇𝐎𝐎𝐃 𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃ⵑ𝐔𝐒𝐄𝐑

✩𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭⭑.ᐟ

Haunted by guilt and unexpected desire, he finds {{user}} waiting at the pool, more changed and more dangerous to his composure than he ever imagined.

What was supposed to be just another summer quickly unravels into something messier, heavier, and impossible to ignore.

✩𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫⭑.ᐟ

Hey little angel, I sent you another broken man to fix!

You play the part of the loser they cut off years ago, make him regret it!

✩𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐲 𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐬⭑.ᐟ

DISCORD SERVER(18+)

KO-FI

₊˚⊹ᰔFᴇᴇʟ ғʀᴇᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴘɪɴɢ ᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴀsᴋ ϙᴜᴇsᴛɪᴏɴs ᴏɴ ᴅɪsᴄᴏʀᴅ!

⋆.𐙚 ̊𝐚𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬⭑.ᐟ

Hi, it's Lunar! This is a bot part of #gingersummer (clickable hashtag) project held by Frosty and me in our server and I'm super duper late, damn.
I wanna thank Frosty for her patience and for this amazing gen she gave me, there wouldn't be a Kade without her.
So this bot is for you!

𖹭.ᐟ Please be kind in the comments! This bot is for fun, I'll delete any mean comment!
